title: Endirium
description: A mod that slightly improves your time in the end.
body: This mod is a fun mod that adds lots of fun stuff to make the end more exciting, while also keeping the original experience. Note: makes it possible to start in the end, just not with a toggle or button. * Biomes Adds 6 new biomes: the "Ender Wilds", the "Midland Ender Wilds ", the "Slimy Slitherlands" the "Raised Void", "Cool Inferno Islands", and the "End Plains". * Tools Adds end stone tools and a new charge called the Enderling Charge. * Armor Adds chorus fruit armor, a basic armor set for use in the end. * Structures Adds the Broken Machine, and the End Creator. * Mobs Adds the Elemental, Glitched Elemental, Slimer, Void Walker, Warped Endermen, and the Enderling. * Other Adds some advancements, 3 new wood types, and fossilized iron ore.   Leave comments in the description, and report bugs. Make sure to tell your friends!!! Modrinth link: Endirium - Minecraft Mod Big Thanks to the Modding Software Company, Pylo, Which I Couldn't have Made This Mod Without! Donations Link: https://mcreator.net/donate
